description_long: This is a large, modern luxury yacht with a sleek, elongated hull and a multi-level superstructure. The hull is predominantly white with dark accents along the waterline and deck edges, and the upper decks feature a combination of white and tan surfaces. The yacht has several visible decks, including an open sun deck at the stern with a blue-tinted pool or lounge area, and a spacious bow area. The superstructure includes a bridge with large windows and a radar mast on top, as well as multiple outdoor seating and relaxation zones. Railings and steps are visible along the sides, providing access between levels. The overall design is streamlined and contemporary, suitable for high-end leisure cruising.
description: A large, modern luxury yacht with a white hull, multiple decks, and a sleek, streamlined design. Features include a sun deck, pool area, and spacious outdoor zones.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the yacht's elongated hull, multi-level decks, and the bridge structure at the center.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, central bridge, and the symmetry of the upper decks.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring the features of view 0, with clear visibility of the stern and sun deck.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the open sun deck, pool or lounge area, and the tiered arrangement of the decks.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a deep-V profile, smooth white finish, black waterline accent, and a pointed bow. The hull is streamlined with no visible keels or chines, designed for efficient cruising.
attribute_deck_layout: Three visible deck levels: a main deck with walkways and railings, an upper deck with a bridge and outdoor seating, and a sun deck at the stern featuring a blue pool or lounge area. Steps and railings connect the levels, and open spaces are provided for relaxation.
attribute_cabin_structure: Central superstructure with a large bridge featuring panoramic windows, multiple exterior doors, and a tiered arrangement of cabins. The cabins have a modern, angular design with white and tan surfaces and several visible windows.
